name: omp-accordion
description: Accordion for OMP — browser-only live context map and reversible folding

scripts.check: bun test tests/*.test.ts && bun build src/index.ts --target=bun --external @oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent --external @oh-my-pi/pi-agent-core --external @oh-my-pi/pi-ai --outdir /tmp/omp-accordion-check
